name: Marketing SEO Landing Page
description: Programmatic SEO landing-page generator for mchatai.com. Single LLM pass produces YAML frontmatter (slug, intent, meta tags, JSON-LD schema, related links, CTAs, FAQ) + the page body (hero + how-to + why-mChatAI + FAQ + CTA). Designed to be run 5-10 times per session, building toward 200 pages in 90 days.
author: mchatai-labs
